k2_system_recap: >>> RECAP: The hero awoke without memory in a strange world. A.R.I.A. system fragment activated - integrity: 12%. Shadow wolves defeated, combat path chosen. An abandoned hut contained a warning: 'Flee to Eldenrath.' The wolf alpha fell. A settlement was detected at the forest's edge.
k2_protag_village: There it is... a village. Wooden houses, smoke rising from chimneys. People. Finally, civilization.
k2_aria_scan_village: >>> Settlement identified: Eldenrath. Population: estimated 200-300. Threat level: LOW. But I'm detecting elevated stress signatures among the inhabitants.
k2_protag_gate: A gate with guards. They don't look particularly welcoming.
k2_aria_gate_warning: >>> Recommendation: No sudden movements. The guards are armed and nervous. Something is troubling this village.
k2_protag_peaceful: I come in peace! I'm just a traveler... I think.
k2_protag_square: The marketplace. A few merchants, children playing... but the adults - they're whispering. And they're watching me.
k2_aria_life_signs: >>> Interesting. Most inhabitants avoid eye contact. Fear. But not of you - of something else.
k2_vex_greeting: Hey, you there! The new one! You look like a wolf spat you out. Come here, I've got hot stew!
k2_vex_intro: Vex. Blacksmith, cook, and village counselor all in one. This place doesn't hold itself together, you know? Sit down. Eat. Then we'll talk.
k2_aria_vex_trust: >>> Heart rate stable. No hostile intent detected. This man appears to be genuine.
k2_aria_who_are_you: Hold it. Who are you, and what do you want in Eldenrath?
k2_protag_no_memory: I... don't know. Honestly. I woke up in the forest with no memories. I'm looking for answers.
k2_aria_suspicious: No memories? How convenient. Too many strangers have shown up here lately - and every time, something burns.
k2_system_aria_match: >>> Identity analyzed: Aria. Young warrior. Combat prowess: remarkable for her age. Trust level: 12%. Work to be done.
k2_vex_bandits: I need to tell you something... The bandits are getting bolder. Last night they raided three supply caches. Their leader, Garak - he fears no one anymore.
k2_aria_bandits_anger: Garak. That coward hides in the forest and sends his lackeys. When I find him, I swear...
k2_protag_help: I'll help you. Against the bandits.
k2_aria_why_help: You? You don't even know your own name and you want to help us? ...Why?
k2_aria_two_options: >>> Tactical analysis: Two options. Direct confrontation at the forest edge - risky, but the bandits lose their element of surprise. Or: Reconnaissance mission - scout their routes and strength.
k2_choice_confront: We face them head-on. They need to know Eldenrath fights back.
k2_choice_sneak: Gather intel first. Knowledge is the sharpest weapon.
k2_protag_confront: Enough hiding. We go out there and show them this village is no easy target.
k2_aria_brave_fool: Either you're the bravest person I've ever met... or the dumbest.
k2_protag_not_hiding: Maybe both. But I'm done hiding.
k2_protag_sneak: We need to be smart about this. How many are there? Where's their camp? What are their weaknesses?
k2_aria_sneak_route: >>> Route calculated. Three lookout posts identified. If we stay quiet, we can map their entire formation.
k2_protag_intel: Perfect. With this intel, we can prepare properly. They won't know what hit them.
k2_aria_training_offer: If you're going to fight bandits tomorrow, you should at least know how to hold a sword properly. I... could show you the basics. If you want.
k2_choice_train_aria: I'd like to train with you, Aria.
k2_choice_train_solo: Thanks, but I'd rather train alone. I need to find my own style.
k2_aria_train_start: Good. First rule: Your center of gravity is too high. Lower. LOWER. There... better. Now attack me.
k2_protag_good_teacher: You're a damn good teacher. Where did you learn all this?
k2_aria_not_bad: You're... not bad. For someone with no memories, you move like you've trained for years.
k2_aria_blush: That was a tactical assessment! Nothing more. ...Focus on your guard.
k2_protag_solo_train: ARIA, analyze my movements. I want to know where my weaknesses are.
k2_aria_solo_tips: >>> Analysis: Your offense is strong, but your left flank is exposed. You also tense your sword grip during evasion. Correction sequence displayed.
k2_protag_stronger: Again. And again. Until every move is flawless.
k2_aria_attack_alert: >>> ALERT! Multiple hostile signatures breaching the western palisade! At least twenty! The bandits are attacking!
k2_aria_they_came: They're here! Damn it, they're attacking from two sides! Everyone, to arms!
k2_protag_defend: Eldenrath will NOT fall today! Everyone, rally to me!
k2_vex_weapons: I've forged a sword for everyone! Take them! Today the whole village fights!
k2_aria_plan: I'll take the east flank. You - go after Garak. If the leader falls, the rest will break!
k2_protag_ready: Garak is mine. This ends tonight.
k2_vex_celebration: WE DID IT! The bandits are fleeing! Eldenrath stands! ELDENRATH STANDS!
k2_aria_impressed: You beat Garak. Alone. No memories, no training... Whoever you were - you were no ordinary person.
k2_protag_together: Not alone. Together. Without all of you, this village wouldn't have survived.
k2_aria_who_are_you_really: Hey. Can I ask you something? And I want an honest answer. ...Who are you REALLY?
k2_protag_wish_i_knew: I wish I could tell you. I truly don't know. But...
k2_protag_flashback: Aghh--! My head... Images! I see... a castle. Flames. And someone calling my name, but I can't--
k2_aria_memory_spike: >>> WARNING: Massive memory fragment spike detected! Neural activity at 340%! Sealed data beginning to destabilize!
k2_aria_concerned: Hey! HEY! What's happening to you?! Your eyes are glowing!
k2_protag_remembering: I... it's over. But I saw something. A castle. Fire. And a voice that said: 'You should not have returned.' ...What does that mean?
k2_consq_confront_vex: Ha! You should've seen their faces when you came out of that forest! The whole village is talking - finally, someone's fighting back.
k2_consq_confront_aria: Not bad, nameless one. The bandits know we're coming now. Good. Let them be afraid.
k2_consq_sneak_aria: >>> Reconnaissance data secured. 23 bandits, 3 camps, 2 escape routes mapped. Their supply depot is unguarded on the north side.
k2_consq_sneak_protag: Now we have their entire network. When they attack, they'll walk right into our trap.
k2_consq_train_aria_aria: That's... enough for today. You learn fast. Too fast, actually. It worries me... and gives me hope at the same time.
k2_consq_train_aria_protag: Thank you, Aria. The training felt like... coming home. Strange, isn't it?
k2_consq_train_solo_aria: >>> Training data analyzed. Combat efficiency increased by 18%. Your muscles seem to remember movement patterns you never learned.
k2_consq_train_solo_protag: My body knows more than my mind. Fine - then I'll let it lead.
k2_protag_isekai_moment: Wait... I can see status bars? HP, MP, Level... This can't be real. What's happening to my eyes?
k2_system_dark_trace: >>> Anomaly: Faint dark energy signature detected from the bandit camp direction. Source: unknown. The bandits are acting more coordinated than common raiders - as if remote-controlled.
k2_vex_past: I wasn't always a blacksmith, you know. Ten years ago I was a soldier. Saw things that... Well. That's why I'm here. To build something, instead of destroying.
k2_protag_dark_mark: What is that? Garak's skin... there are black lines. Like veins, but they glow faintly purple.
k2_system_dark_analysis: >>> Dark rune marking detected on subject. Energy signature: unknown, but 23% match with prologue data. These markings are NOT natural. Someone manipulated this man. The bandits were not simple raiders - they were tools.
k2_aria_dark_concerned: Those are curse markings. I know them from my father's old tales. Someone powerful had Garak in their grip. Whoever it was... they're still out there.
